content.text:
The track ahead shows a clear right-hand curve beginning shortly, with the car well-centered on the straight portion and the curve becoming visible in the image.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 19, target index = (19+5) % 121 = 24
- Target WP24: x=6.6437, y=0.7683
- Car: x=5.8160, y=0.6700, heading=-1.2086°
- dy = 0.7683 - 0.6700 = 0.0983, dx = 6.6437 - 5.8160 = 0.8277
- bearing = atan2(0.0983, 0.8277) = 6.778°
- delta = 6.778 - (-1.2086) = +7.987° → small left correction needed

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.381m, distance_from_center = 0.014m
- edge_distance ≈ 0.367m → well clear on both sides

Delta ~8° → |delta| 5-15°, speed=1.5, steering_angle=5

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead but WP24 shows a slight left delta of ~8°, so apply minimal left steering at full speed to stay on the waypoint line.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight along y≈0.683 before curving right around x=6.3-6.5.",
    "Big right curve begins around waypoint index 22-30 (x~6.3-7.2, y increases from 0.7 to 1.4).",
    "After the right curve, track loops back along y≈2.77 heading left.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use steering_angle=0 on straights to avoid oscillation.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves.",
    "Car heading is ~-1.2° (nearly due east), nearly perfectly centered.",
    "Right curve starts significantly around WP24-30; prepare to steer right when delta goes negative.",
    "No objects on track detected.",
    "Boundary safety check: edge_distance ~0.367m, well clear on both sides."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.5059, 5.6102, 5.7111, 5.8160],
    "y": [0.6781, 0.6762, 0.6719, 0.6700],
    "heading": [-1.042, -1.171, -1.216, -1.209]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP24 at (6.644, 0.768): bearing=6.78°, delta=+7.99° → slight left, steer left gently.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 5.0
}
```
